_doc: Cells the coverage matrix should show as N/A (not_expected) instead of 'missing': partitions whose report genuinely does NOT disclose a given statement (verified against the PDF — never used to hide an extraction gap for data that IS printed). statement='*' = every NON-CORE lane this partition is missing (core BS/PL/cross always stay flagged); statement may also be a single key or a LIST of keys. period and kind default to '*' (wildcard = every quarter / both consolidation bases) — use them for a bank that STRUCTURALLY never files a lane; period (and statement) may also be a LIST to scope a bank that omitted a lane only in some quarters. Entries are applied only when the cell is otherwise 'missing'.

not_disclosed.note: Arap Türk Bankası interim reports carry no branch/personnel count — the note-VIII "Yurt içi şube" table appears only in the year-end (Q4) note VIII (extracted), and there is no activity report. Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.

Participation (Katılım) bank — interest-free; reports profit-share-rate risk (kâr payı oranı riski) as a market-risk capital charge + narrative, NOT the interest-rate repricing ladder (no Faizsiz/non-interest column, no asset-liability repricing schedule with a Toplam Pozisyon row). Verified against PDFs 2026-07-15.

T.O.M. Katılım is a BDDK-approved TFRS-9 NON-APPLIER — it does not run the expected-credit-loss model, so an IFRS-9 stage table cannot exist. Stated positively and verbatim in all four reports (2023Q3 p18, 2023Q4 p23, 2024Q1 p18, 2024Q2 p19) under 'VIII. FİNANSAL VARLIKLARDA DEĞER DÜŞÜKLÜĞÜNE İLİŞKİN AÇIKLAMALAR → Beklenen zarar karşılıklarına ilişkin açıklamalar':
  "Banka, BDDK tarafından yayımlanan 'Kredilerin Sınıflandırılması ve Bunlar İçin Ayrılacak Karşılıklara İlişkin Usul ve Esaslar Hakkında Yönetmelik'in DOKUZUNCU MADDESİNİN ALTINCI FIKRASI kapsamında TFRS 9'un değer düşüklüğüne ilişkin hükümlerini uygulamama konusunda BDDK'ya başvuruda bulunmuş ve Banka'nın talebi, BDDK tarafından kabul edilmiştir. Bu kapsamda karşılık hesaplama metodunu TFRS 9'a göre beklenen kredi zararı modeli ile değil; 31 ARALIK 2025 TARİHİNE KADAR ... 'TFRS 9 uygulamayan bankalarca ayrılacak genel ve özel karşılıklar' düzenlemelerine uygun olarak hesaplayıp muhasebeleştirmektedir."
Corroborated per period, each on POSITIVE evidence (re-verified 2026-07-17 by rendering, not by text search):
  2023Q3 — BS 2.1 Krediler = 0. Bölüm 4's own contents list has no credit-risk section at all (I. Özkaynaklar → II. Kur riski → III. Hisse senedi → IV. Likidite).
  2023Q4 — the ANNUAL report DOES prepare the credit-risk section (pp34-44) and positively prints a nil loan book: 'Finansal varlık sınıfı bazında kredi kalitesine ilişkin bilgiler' (p39) lists Verilen Krediler: Kurumsal/Girişimci -, Bireysel -, İhtisas - (nil both years); the max-exposure table shows 'Verilen Krediler - -' with Toplam kredi risk duyarlılığı 1.599.856 sourced entirely from Bankalar + FVTPL. Independently corroborated by the 2024Q2 report's own prior-period column (31 Aralık 2023 = all dashes).
  2024Q1 — the ₺5.314k loan book IS disclosed, but only BY MATURITY, never by stage: liquidity ladder p36, Verilen Krediler 4.130 (1-3 Ay) + 1.184 (3-12 Ay) = 5.314 = BS 2.1 exactly. The bank states its own materiality at p64: 'Krediler 5.314 TL ile %0,19' of assets. The credit-risk section is explicitly omitted WITH a citation (p29): 'II. Kredi riskine ilişkin açıklamalar — Bankalarca Kamuya Açıklanacak Finansal Tablolar ... Tebliğ'in 25'inci maddesi uyarınca ara dönemde hazırlanmamıştır.' p45 was RENDERED at 3x: the text layer is faithful, the notes run 2→3→4→5 consecutively and the lower third is genuinely blank. 0 images; the 343 drawings are borders around the printed Bankalar/FVTPL tables.
CORRECTS THE PRIOR NOTE, which claimed "the asset-note numbering jumps straight from '2. Bankalar' to '4. Maddi duran varlıklara'" — FALSE. There is no gap: item 3 is 'Gerçeğe uygun değer farkı kar/zarara yansıtılan finansal varlıklara ilişkin bilgiler' (FVTPL, ₺1.454.623 at 2024Q1). TOMK RENUMBERS CONTIGUOUSLY when a note is absent; it never leaves a hole — so a numbering gap is NOT a usable tell for this filer. The real tell is the opposite: 2024Q2 expands to the full BRSA template (6. Krediler, 8. Satış amaçlı, 9. Maddi duran, ...), while 2023Q3/Q4/2024Q1 use a compressed 1-6/1-7 list with no loans note. Control: 2024Q2 p60 Standart Nitelikli 229.268 + Yakın İzlemedeki 1.792 = 231.060 = BS 2.1 exactly.
WHY THE EARLIER SEARCH MISSED THE CITATION: the report spells the article out in words ('dokuzuncu maddesinin altıncı fıkrası', not '9 uncu madde'), uses the regulation's full title (not 'Karşılıklar Yönetmeliği'), and says 'uygulamama konusunda ... başvuruda bulunmuş' (not 'uygulamamaktadır'). All three probe terms returned 0. The single '9 uncu madde' hit at 2024Q1 p26 is a FALSE POSITIVE — it is the Özkaynaklar Yönetmeliği art. 9 on capital valuation adjustments, unrelated.

Sector table uses the legacy pre-IFRS-9 schema (Değer Kaybına Uğramış / Tahsili Gecikmiş / Değer Ayarlamaları / Karşılıklar) — it does NOT break Stage-2/Stage-3 out by sector, so this Stage-by-sector lane is genuinely not disclosed. Extractor skips the page rather than fabricate stage values.
